content.content:
content: '# Web Document


  ## Metadata


  - title: What ticket delivery options does Ticketmaster offer?

  - url: https://help.ticketmaster.com/hc/en-us/articles/9641645631889-What-ticket-delivery-options-does-Ticketmaster-offer

  - source: Ticketmaster Help

  - domain: help.ticketmaster.com


  ## Content


  # What ticket delivery options does Ticketmaster offer?


  Depending on the event, customers may have several ways to access their tickets.
  The order''s delivery method can be found in the ticket details. The delivery method
  determines how the ticket is accessed and presented.


  ## Electronic Tickets (eTickets)


  An electronic ticket may be either a Mobile Entry ticket or a Print-at-Home ticket.
  Customers can sign into their Ticketmaster Account to find and access eTickets.
  In some cases, access may be delayed until closer to the event.


  ## Mobile Tickets


  If an event is Mobile only, or Mobile Entry was selected at checkout, the phone
  is the ticket and the way into the event. Mobile tickets cannot be printed, emailed,
  or presented as screenshots. Ticket barcodes generally become accessible several
  days before the event. Mobile Entry is not available for every event.


  ## Print-at-Home


  Customers using Print-at-Home can sign into their Ticketmaster Account, locate the
  order, view the tickets, and print them. Tickets cannot currently be printed from
  the app. When Print-at-Home is selected, the tickets should be printed before the
  event.


  ## US Mail


  Tickets sent by US Mail are printed and shipped by USPS First Class Mail. Delivery
  timing may take longer when an Event Organizer has placed a delivery delay on the
  event.


  ## Will Call


  To collect tickets held at Will Call, the cardholder needs the credit card used
  for the purchase and a valid photo ID with a signature, such as a state ID, driver''s
  license, or passport.


  ## UPS Delivery


  UPS delivery may offer two-day or three-day shipping. Tickets cannot be shipped
  by UPS to a PO Box or APO/FPO address, and they are not emailed.


  ## Ticket Transfer


  Tickets received through Ticket Transfer are accepted through the instructions sent
  by email. The email address used for the transfer must match the email address on
  the Ticketmaster Account used to accept the tickets.

  '
metadata: {}
title: What ticket delivery options does Ticketmaster offer?
url: https://help.ticketmaster.com/hc/en-us/articles/9641645631889-What-ticket-delivery-options-does-Ticketmaster-offer

Your order **TKT-40618** is for **2 standard-admission tickets** to **Harbor Lights Live** at **Pacific Forum, Los Angeles**, on **August 22, 2026**.

The tickets are set for **Will Call**, so you will **not use a mobile barcode or printed ticket**. To get in:

1. Go to the venue’s **Will Call/ticket window** when you arrive.
2. Bring the **credit card used to purchase the order**.
3. Bring a **valid photo ID with a signature**, such as a driver’s license, state ID, or passport.
4. Ask for the tickets under the purchaser’s name and collect both tickets.
5. Proceed to the entrance and present the tickets to be scanned or checked.

Ticketmaster’s official guidance confirms that Will Call pickup requires the purchase card and valid signed photo ID. Since the order does not list an event time or ticket-holder name, check your Ticketmaster order confirmation or contact the venue before the event for the Will Call opening time and any event-specific identification requirements.

final_answer:
Your order **TKT-40618** is for **2 standard-admission tickets** to **Harbor Lights Live** at **Pacific Forum, Los Angeles**, on **August 22, 2026**.

The tickets are set for **Will Call**, so you will **not use a mobile barcode or printed ticket**. To get in:

1. Go to the venue’s **Will Call/ticket window** when you arrive.
2. Bring the **credit card used to purchase the order**.
3. Bring a **valid photo ID with a signature**, such as a driver’s license, state ID, or passport.
4. Ask for the tickets under the purchaser’s name and collect both tickets.
5. Proceed to the entrance and present the tickets to be scanned or checked.

Ticketmaster’s official guidance confirms that Will Call pickup requires the purchase card and valid signed photo ID. Since the order does not list an event time or ticket-holder name, check your Ticketmaster order confirmation or contact the venue before the event for the Will Call opening time and any event-specific identification requirements.
